spec.description: A dashboard that gives an overview of Tailscale API metrics. The dashboards were generated using [tailscale-mixin](https://github.com/adinhodovic/tailscale-exporter/tree/main/tailscale-mixin). Open issues and create feature requests in the repository.

spec.title: Devices by OS
spec.description: A pie chart showing the distribution of devices by operating system in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Devices by Version
spec.description: A pie chart showing the distribution of devices by Tailscale client version in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Devices with Update Available
spec.description: The total number of devices that have an update available in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Authorized Devices
spec.description: The total number of devices that are authorized to access the tailnet.

spec.title: Devices
spec.description: A table showing all devices in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Devices Settings
spec.description: A table showing all devices in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Update Available
spec.description: A timeseries panel showing devices that have an update available.

spec.title: Time Since Last Seen
spec.description: A timeseries panel showing the last time a device was seen.

spec.title: Users by Role
spec.description: A pie chart showing the distribution of users by role in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Total Users
spec.description: The total number of users in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Users by Status
spec.description: A pie chart showing the distribution of users by status in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Users by Type
spec.description: A pie chart showing the distribution of users by type in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Users Logged In
spec.description: The total number of users that are currently logged in to the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Users
spec.description: A table showing all users in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Keys
spec.description: A table showing all keys in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Total Devices
spec.description: The total number of devices in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Devices Logged In
spec.description: The total number of devices that are currently online in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Total Keys
spec.description: The total number of keys in the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Nameservers
spec.description: A table showing the nameservers configured for the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Magic DNS Enabled
spec.description: Whether Magic DNS is enabled for the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Tailnet Settings
spec.description: A table showing the current settings for the selected tailnet.

spec.title: Tailscale / Overview
